data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the progress dashboard.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a progress dashboard (% complete). However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or checks that confirm the existence of this feature. The only related evidence is a summary of the use case, which does not demonstrate that the system can provide a progress dashboard as specified.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or functionality for the progress dashboard (% complete).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence of the progress dashboard.
